title: invoice — model relationships
description: Three owned entities. Invoice is the aggregate root; InvoiceLine + CreditNote attach to it. Every outbound FK stays same-tenant per tenancy-columns.md §5. NO application_id / region_id / organization_id / branch_id / scope_node_id on any owned row.

internal.description: Per-invoice line items. RESTRICT on invoice hard-delete via observer (financial retention prevents delete).
RESTRICT — lines anchor to their invoice for audit continuity. Soft-delete on lines is only permitted while parent invoice.status='draft'.
Reversal credit notes for this invoice. Zero-or-more per invoice (one per refund / adjustment / write-off).

RESTRICT — credit notes anchor to their original invoice. Financial retention: invoices + credit notes both retained 7 years (10 Enterprise); credit notes may OUTLIVE invoices in the compliance archive (invoices archived at 7y; credit notes retained indefinitely via the TenantErased-only purge path).

outbound.description: Every invoice is tenant-scoped per tenancy-columns.md §3.

Polymorphic customer: User, Athlete, Organization. Each customer_type has its own tenant scoping; InvoiceObserver validates that customer.tenant_id == invoice.tenant_id (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling).

Set when the invoice is for a membership renewal or initial signup. RESTRICT — cannot delete a membership with open invoices. When membership_id is set + invoice.status='paid': the load-bearing InvoicePaid handler fires marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent.
Set when the invoice is for a specific renewal period (not the initial signup). RESTRICT.
The admin who created the invoice manually. NULL for system-created invoices (via CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook).
Denormalised tenant_id — cascades through invoice.tenant_id but explicit for query-plan + FK integrity.
Per-line tax computation snapshot. RESTRICT — TaxCalculation cannot be deleted while referenced by a line. NULL until CalculateInvoiceTaxJob completes.
Set on discount_line items when a coupon is applied. RESTRICT — CouponRedemption cannot be deleted while referenced.
Optional polymorphic link back to the source of the line (Membership, Session, Event, etc.). Used for report drill-down + auditing.
The admin who issued the credit note. RESTRICT for audit integrity — user hard-delete cannot orphan credit-note issuance records.
Polymorphic target of applied credit notes: refund::Refund / invoice::Invoice (next invoice offset) / user::UserBalance (customer balance credit). NULL when status='draft' or 'issued'.

inbound.description: Downstream modules attach to Invoice + CreditNote via FK. See below.

examples.note: Every transaction row (payment / refund / adjustment) may reference an invoice. Transactions are the double-entry ledger; invoices are the customer-facing bill. Transaction.invoice_id is RESTRICT (transactions cannot orphan).
Payment intents carry invoice_id in their metadata jsonb (not a hard FK — the payment module is independently ledgered). The MarkPaidOnPaymentIntentConfirmed listener reads this to link back.
Every refund references an invoice. Refund.invoice_id is RESTRICT.
Every chargeback references an invoice. Chargeback.invoice_id is RESTRICT.
Marketing events created via CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent carry the invoice OR membership as their polymorphic subject. Not an FK — marketing is a fan-out layer over domain events.

morphs.description: Polymorphic customer of the invoice. Each supported type is tenant-scoped. Observer validates cross-model tenant integrity on write.
Optional polymorphic back-reference to the source of the line item. Used for drill-down in reports + drift-detection during audits.
Polymorphic target of applied credit notes. Set on status transition issued → applied.

notes: None of the three owned rows carry `application_id` — cascades through tenant_id → tenants.application_id per tenancy-columns.md §2. Only the 8 named rows carry application_id directly; invoices/invoice_lines/credit_notes are NOT among them.
None of the three owned rows carry `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, or `scope_node_id`. Invoices are a domain-plane concern — the growth/scope substrate does not apply.

InvoiceLine.tax_calculation_id is a snapshot reference — when the tax rate on the underlying jurisdiction changes, the invoice line still holds the historical rate via the frozen TaxCalculation row. This is what makes invoices immutable-after-finalize.

CreditNote may OUTLIVE its original invoice in the compliance archive — invoices are archived after 7 years; credit notes retain indefinitely. The `original_invoice()` relation resolves via RESTRICT + archived-row lookup.

The morph on Invoice.customer supports Organization (a business-to-business invoice) in addition to individual customers. Organization-scoped invoices are tenant-scoped (org.tenant_id) — the observer validates this.
